title: Fun Time Time Shape Sorter Bus, 55889
features: Push along activity bus, suitable for age 12 months and upwards
Chunky play shapes to count and stack
description: Product Description Product description this multi-coloured, shape sorter bus toy from fun time makes an ideal choice for your young toddler. it’s educational, sturdy and the fun and games never stop. push the bus along and sort the chunky, brightly coloured shapes through the holes in the top and sides of the bus.we can’t promise that the fun time range of toys will make your child a genius, but they will certainly stimulate their senses and help to develop their skills. there’s only one word for the shape sorter bus toy and that word is “fun”.this product conforms to en71 and the toy safety directive. please remove all packaging before giving it to your child. this toy is suitable for age 12 months and upwards. box contains 1 x shape sorter bus12 x shapes Safety Warning Warning: Keep under adult supervision
